name: io.github.Xquik-dev/xquik
description: Real-time X (Twitter) data platform. MCP v2 server with 2-tool sandbox (explore + xquik) covering 56 REST API endpoints: tweet search, user lookup, media download, 20 extraction tools, account monitoring, events, webhooks, trends, radar, tweet composer, style analysis, drafts, and giveaway draws. Legacy v1 server with 18 discrete tools also available.
